    99→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   100→# Utility helpers
   101→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   102→
   103→
   104→def _s(v) -> str:
   105→    """Cell value → trimmed string; None → ''."""
   106→    if v is None:
   107→        return ""
   108→    return str(v).strip()
   109→
   110→
   111→def _nonblank(row: tuple) -> bool:
   112→    return any(_s(c) != "" for c in row)
   113→
   114→
   115→def _find_label_row(ws: Worksheet, label_needle: str, max_row: int = 100, search_cols: int = 10) -> int | None:
   116→    """Find the first row whose any cell (within `search_cols`) strip-equals the needle."""
   117→    for r_idx, row in enumerate(
   118→        ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=max_row, max_col=search_cols, values_only=True),
   119→        start=1,
   120→    ):
   121→        for cell in row:
   122→            if _s(cell) == label_needle:
   123→                return r_idx
   124→    return None
   125→
   126→
   127→def _cell_right_of_label(ws: Worksheet, label: str, max_row: int = 100, search_cols: int = 10) -> str:
   128→    """Find the label in any cell, return the non-empty cell to its immediate right.
   129→
   130→    Tolerates multiple label hits (takes first). Returns '' if not found.
   131→    """
   132→    for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=max_row, max_col=search_cols, values_only=True):
   133→        for c_idx, cell in enumerate(row[:-1]):
   134→            if _s(cell) == label:
   135→                # scan right until we find non-empty
   136→                for follow in row[c_idx + 1:]:
   137→                    if _s(follow) != "":
   138→                        return _s(follow)
   139→                return ""
   140→    return ""
   141→
   142→
   143→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   144→# Sheet parsers
   145→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   146→
   147→
   148→def parse_project_info(ws: Worksheet, spec: ParsedSpec) -> None:
   149→    spec.project.name_zh = _cell_right_of_label(ws, "遊戲名稱(中文)")
   150→    spec.project.name_en = _cell_right_of_label(ws, "遊戲名稱(英文)")
   151→    spec.project.game_id = _cell_right_of_label(ws, "GAME ID")
   152→    spec.project.short_name = _cell_right_of_label(ws, "縮寫")
   153→
   154→    for field_name, attr in (
   155→        ("遊戲名稱(中文)", "name_zh"),
   156→        ("GAME ID", "game_id"),
   157→        ("縮寫", "short_name"),
   158→    ):
   159→        if not getattr(spec.project, attr):
   160→            spec.warnings.append(f"project_info: 找不到欄位 {field_name!r}")
   161→
   162→
   163→def _parse_board_size(board_str: str) -> tuple[int | None, int | None]:
   164→    """Parse '3X5' → (ROW=3, COL=5).  Also accepts '3x5', '3×5', ' 3 X 5 '."""
   165→    if not board_str:
   166→        return None, None
   167→    m = re.search(r"(\d+)\s*[xX×]\s*(\d+)", board_str)
   168→    if not m:
   169→        return None, None
   170→    return int(m.group(1)), int(m.group(2))
   171→
   172→
   173→def _classify_pay_mode(lines_str: str) -> str:
   174→    """'243 WAYS' / '1024 WAYS' → SCATTER_PAY; '10 LINES' → LINE_PAY."""
   175→    if not lines_str:
   176→        return "UNKNOWN"
   177→    s = lines_str.upper()
   178→    if "WAY" in s:
   179→        return "SCATTER_PAY"
   180→    if "LINE" in s or "線" in lines_str:
   181→        return "LINE_PAY"
   182→    if "CLUSTER" in s:
   183→        return "CLUSTER_PAY"
   184→    return "UNKNOWN"
   185→
   186→
   187→def parse_basic_header(ws: Worksheet, spec: ParsedSpec) -> None:
   188→    board = _cell_right_of_label(ws, "盤面大小", max_row=50)
   189→    lines = _cell_right_of_label(ws, "中獎線數", max_row=50)
   190→    sym_notes = _cell_right_of_label(ws, "符號種類", max_row=50)
   191→
   192→    spec.row, spec.col = _parse_board_size(board)
   193→    spec.pay_mode = _classify_pay_mode(lines)
   194→    spec.symbol_notes = sym_notes
   195→    # Uniform board: generate layout string like "3x3x3x3x3"
   196→    if spec.row and spec.col:
   197→        spec.board_layout = "x".join([str(spec.row)] * spec.col)
   198→
   199→    if spec.row is None or spec.col is None:
   200→        spec.warnings.append(
   201→            f"basic: 無法解析盤面大小 (原值 {board!r})。請確認『基本規格』sheet 的『盤面大小』值格式為 'ROW×COL' (如 3X5)"
   202→        )
   203→    if spec.pay_mode == "UNKNOWN":
   204→        spec.warnings.append(
   205→            f"basic: 無法辨識中獎線數 {lines!r} 的賠付模式，fallback=UNKNOWN"
   206→        )
   207→
   208→
   209→_CATEGORY_FROM_DISPLAY = [
   210→    # lower-priority displays first so specific matches win
   211→    ("SCATTER", "scatter"),
   212→    ("WILD", "wild"),
   213→    ("神秘", "special"),
   214→    ("金幣", "special"),
   215→]
   216→
   217→
   218→# Whitelist of safe display → enum-name aliases.
   219→# Rules:
   220→#   - Only map displays we are CERTAIN about; preserve Symbol_NN for everything
   221→#     else (e.g. 盆栽, 扇子, 猛虎, 神龍 are game-specific Chinese names that we
   222→#     refuse to auto-translate — wrong English could break downstream).
   223→#   - SCATTER(X) → ScatterX via _scatter_variant_alias() so we don't have to
   224→#     enumerate every variant.
   225→#   - Keys are uppercase-compared so "wild" / "Wild" / "WILD" all match.
   226→_SYMBOL_ALIAS_MAP: dict[str, str] = {
   227→    "9": "Nine",
   228→    "10": "Ten",
   229→    "J": "J",
   230→    "Q": "Q",
   231→    "K": "K",
   232→    "A": "A",
   233→    "WILD": "Wild",
   234→    "SCATTER": "Scatter",
   235→}
   236→
   237→
   238→def _scatter_variant_alias(display: str) -> str | None:
   239→    """Map 'SCATTER(猛虎)' → 'ScatterTiger' only for a small whitelist of
   240→    well-known Mandarin game symbols we've seen in UK slots. Return None if
   241→    we can't be confident."""
   242→    # only handle forms like SCATTER(...)
   243→    m = re.match(r"SCATTER\(([^)]+)\)", display.strip(), flags=re.IGNORECASE)
   244→    if not m:
   245→        return None
   246→    inner = m.group(1).strip()
   247→    # whitelist — add more as we encounter new UK slot Chinese variants
   248→    inner_map: dict[str, str] = {
   249→        "猛虎": "Tiger",
   250→        "神龍": "Dragon",
   251→        "鯉魚": "Koi",
   252→        "虎": "Tiger",
   253→        "龍": "Dragon",
   254→        "魚": "Koi",
   255→    }
   256→    if inner in inner_map:
   257→        return f"Scatter{inner_map[inner]}"
   258→    # if inner is already ASCII (e.g. SCATTER(GOLD)) → ScatterGold
   259→    if re.fullmatch(r"[A-Za-z0-9_]+", inner):
   260→        return f"Scatter{inner.capitalize()}"
   261→    return None
   262→
   263→
   264→def _resolve_enum_name(raw: str, display: str) -> str:
   265→    """Decide the TypeScript enum name.
   266→
   267→    Preference order:
   268→      1. Scatter variant match (e.g. SCATTER(猛虎) → ScatterTiger)
   269→      2. Direct whitelist hit on display (e.g. '9' → 'Nine', 'WILD' → 'Wild')
   270→      3. Fall back to raw 系統命名 column value (e.g. 'Symbol_06') — this is
   271→         always a valid TypeScript identifier and preserves the original
   272→         ordering.
   273→
   274→    We deliberately DO NOT translate game-specific Chinese symbols (盆栽,
   275→    扇子, 猛虎 etc.) to avoid brittle/ambiguous English names.
   276→    """
   277→    d = (display or "").strip()
   278→    if not d:
   279→        return raw or "UnnamedSymbol"
   280→    # 1. scatter variant
   281→    scatter_alias = _scatter_variant_alias(d)
   282→    if scatter_alias:
   283→        return scatter_alias
   284→    # 2. direct whitelist
   285→    alias = _SYMBOL_ALIAS_MAP.get(d.upper())
   286→    if alias:
   287→        return alias
   288→    # 3. fallback
   289→    return raw or f"Symbol_Unknown_{d}"
   290→
   291→
   292→def _is_server_only(side_col_b: str) -> bool:
   293→    """Detect whether this symbol row falls under the 'Server用' sticky side tag."""
   294→    side = side_col_b or ""
   295→    side_normalized = re.sub(r"\s+", "", side)
   296→    return (
   297→        "SERVER" in side_normalized.upper()
   298→        or "伺服器" in side_normalized
   299→        or side_normalized == "Server用"
   300→    )
   301→
   302→
   303→def _classify_symbol(display: str, side_col_b: str, idx: int, total_low_hint: int | None) -> str:
   304→    """Best-effort classification.
   305→
   306→    Rules:
   307→      1. server-only rows → classified to 'special' by category, and `server_only=True`
   308→         is recorded separately on SymbolRow by the caller. This keeps the set of
   309→         categories aligned with `_input-format.md` (low/high/wild/scatter/special)
   310→         while preserving the 'server-only' semantic elsewhere. (See E2E-1 fix)
   311→      2. col B tag '特殊' + display contains SCATTER/WILD → that
   312→      3. col B tag '特殊' + otherwise → special
   313→      4. col B tag '一般' → low/high by display heuristic
   314→         - display in {9,10,J,Q,K,A} → low
   315→         - everything else → high
   316→    """
   317→    side = side_col_b or ""
   318→    side_normalized = re.sub(r"\s+", "", side)
   319→    disp_upper = display.upper()
   320→    # (1) Server-only rows collapse to 'special' for the skill's 5-category schema.
   321→    if _is_server_only(side):
   322→        return "special"
   323→    if "特殊" in side_normalized:
   324→        for keyword, cat in _CATEGORY_FROM_DISPLAY:
   325→            if keyword in disp_upper:
   326→                return cat
   327→        return "special"
   328→    # 一般 / default
   329→    if disp_upper in {"9", "10", "J", "Q", "K", "A"} or display in {"9", "10"}:
   330→        return "low"
   331→    return "high"
   332→
   333→
   334→def parse_symbol_table(ws: Worksheet, spec: ParsedSpec) -> None:
   335→    """Walk rows to find '■Symbol賠付表' header, then parse rows until next '■'."""
   336→    start_row = _find_label_row(ws, "■Symbol賠付表  (Win=Total Bet*Pay)", max_row=300)
   337→    if start_row is None:
   338→        # try looser match
   339→        for r_idx, row in enumerate(
   340→            ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=300, max_col=10, values_only=True),
   341→            start=1,
   342→        ):
   343→            for cell in row:
   344→                txt = _s(cell)
   345→                if txt.startswith("■Symbol") or txt.startswith("■符號"):
   346→                    start_row = r_idx
   347→                    break
   348→            if start_row:
   349→                break
   350→    if start_row is None:
   351→        spec.warnings.append("symbols: 找不到『■Symbol賠付表』區塊，無法解析符號清單")
   352→        return
   353→
   354→    # data rows start 2 rows after the "編號 | 系統命名 | SYMBOL樣式 | ..." header
   355→    current_side = ""  # 一般 / 特殊 / Server用 (sticky between rows)
   356→    for r_idx, row in enumerate(
   357→        ws.iter_rows(min_row=start_row + 1, max_row=start_row + 80, max_col=10, values_only=True),
   358→        start=start_row + 1,
   359→    ):
   360→        cells = [_s(c) for c in row]
   361→        # abort if we hit the next "■" section
   362→        if any(c.startswith("■") for c in cells):
   363→            break
   364→
   365→        col_b, col_c, col_d, col_e = cells[1], cells[2], cells[3], cells[4]
   366→        # normalize the side tag: Excel cells sometimes contain an embedded newline
   367→        # like "Server\n用" due to in-cell wrapping; collapse all whitespace so the
   368→        # sticky state machine picks it up correctly.
   369→        col_b_normalized = re.sub(r"\s+", "", col_b)
   370→        if col_b_normalized in ("一般", "特殊", "Server用"):
   371→            current_side = col_b_normalized
   372→        # expect col_c to be numeric symbol index
   373→        if not re.fullmatch(r"\d+", col_c):
   374→            continue
   375→        idx = int(col_c)
   376→        raw_enum = col_d  # Symbol_00 / Symbol_11 etc
   377→        display = col_e
   378→        if not raw_enum:
   379→            continue
   380→        category = _classify_symbol(display, current_side, idx, None)
   381→        server_only = _is_server_only(current_side)
   382→        # Alias lookup: try to promote well-known symbols ('9'→Nine, 'WILD'→Wild,
   383→        # 'SCATTER(猛虎)'→ScatterTiger) while keeping non-whitelisted Chinese
   384→        # names (盆栽/扇子/猛虎/神龍) as Symbol_NN for safety.
   385→        enum_name = _resolve_enum_name(raw_enum, display)
   386→        spec.symbols.append(
   387→            SymbolRow(
   388→                index=idx,
   389→                enum_name=enum_name,
   390→                raw_enum_name=raw_enum,
   391→                display=display,
   392→                category=category,
   393→                server_only=server_only,
   394→            )
   395→        )
   396→
   397→    if not spec.symbols:
   398→        spec.warnings.append("symbols: 已找到賠付表 header，但解析不到任何 symbol 資料列")
   399→
   400→
   401→def parse_cheat_keys(ws: Worksheet, spec: ParsedSpec) -> None:
   402→    start_row = None
   403→    for r_idx, row in enumerate(
   404→        ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=300, max_col=10, values_only=True),
   405→        start=1,
   406→    ):
   407→        for cell in row:
   408→            txt = _s(cell)
   409→            if txt.startswith("■特色展示碼"):
   410→                start_row = r_idx
   411→                break
   412→        if start_row:
   413→            break
   414→    if start_row is None:
   415→        spec.warnings.append("cheat_keys: 找不到『■特色展示碼』區塊，Demo_Module CHEAT_KEY 將使用預設值")
   416→        return
   417→
   418→    # skip the header row ("效果 | 編號 | 備註")
   419→    for r_idx, row in enumerate(
   420→        ws.iter_rows(min_row=start_row + 1, max_row=start_row + 80, max_col=10, values_only=True),
   421→        start=start_row + 1,
   422→    ):
   423→        cells = [_s(c) for c in row]
   424→        if any(c.startswith("■") for c in cells):
   425→            break
   426→        effect = cells[1]
   427→        code = cells[2]
   428→        note = cells[3] if len(cells) > 3 else ""
   429→        # header row has effect="效果"
   430→        if effect in ("", "效果"):
   431→            continue
   432→        if not re.fullmatch(r"-?\d+", code):
   433→            continue
   434→        spec.cheat_keys.append(CheatKeyRow(effect=effect, code=code, note=note))
   435→
   436→
   437→def parse_audio(ws: Worksheet, spec: ParsedSpec) -> None:
   438→    """Walk 音樂音效規格表. Each section header row has col B = section name
   439→    and col C = 'LOOP'. Data rows have col A = index number."""
   440→    current_section = ""
   441→    for r_idx, row in enumerate(
   442→        ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=200, max_col=10, values_only=True),
   443→        start=1,
   444→    ):
   445→        cells = [_s(c) for c in row]
   446→        col_a, col_b, col_c, col_g = cells[0], cells[1], cells[2] if len(cells) > 2 else "", cells[6] if len(cells) > 6 else ""
   447→        note_col = cells[5] if len(cells) > 5 else ""
   448→
   449→        # Section header detection: col B looks like a name, col C == 'LOOP'
   450→        if col_c == "LOOP" and col_b and col_a == "":
   451→            current_section = col_b
   452→            continue
   453→
   454→        # skip pure header rows
   455→        if not col_g:
   456→            continue
   457→        if col_b in ("項目", "", "LOOP"):
   458→            continue
   459→        # 檔名 col_g: allow multi-line (the xlsx sometimes stuffs 3 names separated by \n)
   460→        filenames = [fn.strip() for fn in col_g.replace("\r", "").split("\n") if fn.strip()]
   461→        for fn in filenames:
   462→            spec.audio_clips.append(
   463→                AudioClip(section=current_section or "未分類", item_zh=col_b, filename=fn, note=note_col)
   464→            )
   465→
   466→
   467→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   468→# Performance-flow hint scanner
   469→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   470→
   471→
   472→# Map of sheet name → (hint_kind, one-line description).
   473→# We walk this table against the xlsx's sheet list and record any match, so the
   474→# final Game_Spec.md's Performance_Flow section tells the designer what extra
   475→# information the xlsx contains. We deliberately DO NOT try to parse these
   476→# sheets into step lists — empirically they contain art-animation details
   477→# (Spine nodes / durations / effect-layer names) or state-combo tags, not
   478→# sequenced state-machine steps. Trying to auto-derive steps from them would
   479→# produce a brittle, misleading Performance_Flow.
   480→_PERFORMANCE_HINT_SHEETS: list[tuple[str, str, str]] = [
   481→    (
   482→        "三色幣主場狀態設定",
   483→        "state-combo-tag",
   484→        "列出 Scatter 組合類型 tag（如 Scatter_3MG / Scatter_1B / Scatter_2BR），"
   485→        "非線性流程步驟。若 codegen skill 需區分多 Scatter 組合，這些 tag 可當 proto enum。",
   486→    ),
   487→    (
   488→        "Scatter_JP動畫狀態",
   489→        "state-combo-tag",
   490→        "Scatter JP 動畫狀態 tag；空 sheet 或極少內容時代表此特色未啟用。",
   491→    ),
   492→    (
   493→        "前導動畫串接",
   494→        "art-animation",
   495→        "前導動畫（GameIntro / Reel 出場）的 Spine 節點 + 動畫時長描述。"
   496→        "屬美術交付細節，不是狀態機步驟。",
   497→    ),
   498→    (
   499→        "NearWin動畫",
   500→        "art-animation",
   501→        "NearWin 特效層名（如 FX_NearWin / FX_NearWin_Back）；供美術端放節點參考。",
   502→    ),
   503→    (
   504→        "FG_Declare宣告",
   505→        "art-animation",
   506→        "FG 宣告畫面的 Spine / UI 細節，若空代表此流程走共用模板。",
   507→    ),
   508→    (
   509→        "NodeTree",
   510→        "scene-structure",
   511→        "整棵 Scene 節點樹。對應 Cocos Scene 建構（不進 Game_Spec，但 codegen 階段二可用於輔助 Scene 建置）。",
   512→    ),
   513→    (
   514→        "Prefab資源",
   515→        "art-manifest",
   516→        "Prefab 清單；屬 ART_ASSET_MANIFEST 範疇，不影響 Performance_Flow。",
   517→    ),
   518→]
   519→
   520→
   521→def scan_performance_hints(wb: openpyxl.workbook.workbook.Workbook, spec: ParsedSpec) -> None:
   522→    """Don't parse these sheets — only record their presence + size, so the
   523→    resulting Game_Spec.md can tell downstream agents / designers which extra
   524→    context is in the xlsx.
   525→    """
   526→    for sheet_name, kind, summary in _PERFORMANCE_HINT_SHEETS:
   527→        if sheet_name not in wb.sheetnames:
   528→            continue
   529→        ws = wb[sheet_name]
   530→        # rough size: count rows that have any non-empty cell
   531→        nonempty_rows = 0
   532→        for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=min(ws.max_row, 600), max_col=min(ws.max_column, 30), values_only=True):
   533→            if any(_s(c) != "" for c in row):
   534→                nonempty_rows += 1
   535→        spec.performance_hints.append(
   536→            {
   537→                "sheet": sheet_name,
   538→                "kind": kind,
   539→                "summary": summary,
   540→                "row_count": nonempty_rows,
   541→            }
   542→        )
   543→
   544→
   545→def derive_feature_flags(spec: ParsedSpec) -> None:
   546→    # HAS_FREE_GAME: any symbol is scatter OR audio section contains 'FG'
   547→    has_scatter_symbol = any(s.category == "scatter" for s in spec.symbols)
   548→    has_fg_audio = any(
   549→        "FG" in c.section or c.item_zh.startswith("FG") or c.filename.lower().startswith("fg_")
   550→        for c in spec.audio_clips
   551→    )
   552→    if has_scatter_symbol or has_fg_audio:
   553→        spec.has_free_game = True
   554→
   555→    # HAS_JACKPOT: audio contains Grand, or any cheat has GRAND/JP keyword
   556→    has_jp_audio = any(
   557→        "Grand" in c.item_zh or "Grand" in c.filename or "Grand" in c.note
   558→        for c in spec.audio_clips
   559→    )
   560→    has_jp_cheat = any(
   561→        "JP" in ck.effect.upper() or "GRAND" in ck.effect.upper() for ck in spec.cheat_keys
   562→    )
   563→    if has_jp_audio or has_jp_cheat:
   564→        spec.has_jackpot = True
   565→
   566→    # HAS_BUY_BONUS: cheat-key or symbol table hint
   567→    if any("BUY" in ck.effect.upper() or "購買" in ck.effect for ck in spec.cheat_keys):
   568→        spec.has_buy_bonus = True
   569→
   570→    # CUSTOM_FEATURES: detect non-standard mechanics from audio/cheat/symbol/performance hints
   571→    _standard_keywords = {"FG", "FREE", "SCATTER", "WILD", "GRAND", "MAJOR", "MINOR", "MINI",
   572→                          "JP", "JACKPOT", "BUY", "BONUS", "BGM", "SPIN", "WIN", "STOP",
   573→                          "NEAR", "BASE", "NORMAL", "BUTTON", "REEL"}
   574→    custom_seen: set[str] = set()
   575→    # From audio sections that hint at custom mechanics
   576→    for c in spec.audio_clips:
   577→        section_upper = c.section.upper() if c.section else ""
   578→        if section_upper and not any(kw in section_upper for kw in _standard_keywords):
   579→            label = c.section.strip()
   580→            if label and label not in custom_seen:
   581→                custom_seen.add(label)
   582→    # From cheat keys with non-standard effects
   583→    for ck in spec.cheat_keys:
   584→        effect_upper = ck.effect.upper()
   585→        if not any(kw in effect_upper for kw in _standard_keywords):
   586→            label = ck.effect.strip()
   587→            if label and label not in custom_seen:
   588→                custom_seen.add(label)
   589→    # From performance_hints with unique kind
   590→    for ph in spec.performance_hints:
   591→        kind = ph.get("kind", "")
   592→        if kind and kind.upper() not in {"STANDARD", "FREE_GAME", "BASE_GAME", "RESPIN"}:
   593→            if kind not in custom_seen:
   594→                custom_seen.add(kind)
   595→    spec.custom_features = sorted(custom_seen)
   596→

   600→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

   602→
   603→def _audio_key_from_item(item_zh: str, filename: str, section: str) -> str:
   604→    """Build an AudioClips key that reads nicely in TS code. Prefer filename basename
   605→    over zh translation because filename is already an identifier."""
   606→    if filename:
   607→        return filename  # spec-adapter leaves it in raw form; codegen skill will PascalCase if needed
   608→    # fallback: strip spaces from zh
   609→    return re.sub(r"\s+", "_", item_zh)
   610→
   611→
   612→def emit_markdown(spec: ParsedSpec) -> str:
   613→    lines: list[str] = []
   614→    P = spec.project
   615→
   616→    title = (P.name_zh or P.name_en or "Unknown Slot").strip()
   617→    lines.append(f"# Game_Spec — {title}")
   618→    lines.append("")
   619→    lines.append("> 本檔由 `uk-slot-spec-adapter` 從 xlsx 自動產生。")
   620→    lines.append("> 作為 `slot-game-codegen-skill` 階段一（Game_Summary_File 生成）的輸入。")
   621→    lines.append("> 若有 ⚠ 警示，代表對應欄位在原 xlsx 中無法被自動解析，請人工補齊。")
   622→    lines.append("")
   623→
   624→    # ----- Parse warnings first (hard to miss) -----
   625→    if spec.warnings:
   626→        lines.append("## ⚠ Parse Warnings")
   627→        lines.append("")
   628→        for w in spec.warnings:
   629→            lines.append(f"- {w}")
   630→        lines.append("")
   631→
   632→    # ----- Project info -----
   633→    lines.append("## 專案資訊")
   634→    lines.append("")
   635→    lines.append(f"- 遊戲名稱（中文）：{P.name_zh or '⚠ 未找到'}")
   636→    lines.append(f"- 遊戲名稱（英文）：{P.name_en or '⚠ 未找到'}")
   637→    lines.append(f"- GAME ID：{P.game_id or '⚠ 未找到'}")
   638→    lines.append(f"- 縮寫（short name）：{P.short_name or '⚠ 未找到'}")
   639→    lines.append("")
   640→
   641→    # ----- Reel config -----
   642→    lines.append("## 轉輪配置")
   643→    lines.append("")
   644→    lines.append(f"- COL: {spec.col if spec.col is not None else '⚠ 未解析'}")
   645→    lines.append(f"- ROW: {spec.row if spec.row is not None else '⚠ 未解析'}")
   646→    if spec.col and spec.row:
   647→        if spec.board_layout and "x" in spec.board_layout:
   648→            clean_bl = re.split(r"[、，,\(（]", spec.board_layout)[0].strip()
   649→            parts = re.split(r"[xX×]", clean_bl)
   650→            if len(parts) > 2 and all(p.strip().isdigit() for p in parts):
   651→                # Variable board: sum of per-column rows
   652→                total = sum(int(p.strip()) for p in parts)
   653→            else:
   654→                # Simple ROWxCOL format: uniform board
   655→                total = spec.col * spec.row
   656→        else:
   657→            total = spec.col * spec.row
   658→        lines.append(f"- FULL_PLATE_NUM: {total}（各列 row 加總）")
   659→    if spec.board_layout:
   660→        lines.append(f"- BoardLayout: `{spec.board_layout}`")
   661→    lines.append(f"- PayMode: `{spec.pay_mode}`")
   662→    if spec.symbol_notes:
   663→        lines.append(f"- 符號種類（原文）：{spec.symbol_notes}")
   664→    lines.append("")
   665→
   666→    # ----- Symbols -----
   667→    lines.append("## 符號定義")
   668→    lines.append("")
   669→    if not spec.symbols:
   670→        lines.append("⚠ 未解析到任何符號，請檢查原 xlsx 的『■Symbol賠付表』區塊。")
   671→    else:
   672→        lines.append("| 列舉名稱 | 原命名 | 類型 | 說明 | 備註 |")
   673→        lines.append("|---|---|---|---|---|")
   674→        for s in spec.symbols:
   675→            note_bits = [f"idx={s.index}"]
   676→            if s.server_only:
   677→                note_bits.append("Server only")
   678→            if s.enum_name != s.raw_enum_name:
   679→                note_bits.append(f"alias ← {s.display!r}")
   680→            note_str = "; ".join(note_bits)
   681→            # If alias was used, 原命名 column shows Symbol_NN as a cross-reference;
   682→            # otherwise it's the same as enum_name.
   683→            raw_display = s.raw_enum_name if s.raw_enum_name != s.enum_name else "—"
   684→            lines.append(f"| {s.enum_name} | {raw_display} | {s.category} | {s.display} | {note_str} |")
   685→    lines.append("")
   686→
   687→    # ----- Features -----
   688→    lines.append("## 特色玩法")
   689→    lines.append("")
   690→    lines.append(f"- HAS_FREE_GAME: **{spec.has_free_game}**")
   691→    lines.append(f"- HAS_JACKPOT: **{spec.has_jackpot}**")
   692→    lines.append(f"- HAS_BUY_BONUS: **{spec.has_buy_bonus}**")
   693→    lines.append("")
   694→    if spec.custom_features:
   695→        lines.append("## Custom Features")
   696→        lines.append("")
   697→        lines.append("> 以下為 adapter 偵測到的非標準特色玩法（不在 FG/JP/BuyBonus 範疇），")
   698→        lines.append("> 需 Step 3.10.8 人工確認是否實作。")
   699→        lines.append("")
   700→        for cf in spec.custom_features:
   701→            lines.append(f"- {cf}")
   702→        lines.append("")
   703→    lines.append("> 以上旗標為 adapter 依符號表 / 音效表 / CHEAT_KEY 關鍵字推導，")
   704→    lines.append("> 若與設計預期不同請於 Game_Summary_File 階段手動覆寫。")
   705→    lines.append("")
   706→
   707→    # ----- Audio -----
   708→    lines.append("## 音效需求清單")
   709→    lines.append("")
   710→    if not spec.audio_clips:
   711→        lines.append("⚠ 未解析到任何音效項目，請檢查原 xlsx 的『音樂音效規格表』sheet。")
   712→    else:
   713→        lines.append("| 鍵名(Key / FileName) | 檔名 | 分區 | 說明 |")
   714→        lines.append("|---|---|---|---|")
   715→        for c in spec.audio_clips:
   716→            key = _audio_key_from_item(c.item_zh, c.filename, c.section)
   717→            note = (c.note or "").replace("\n", " ").replace("|", "／")
   718→            item = (c.item_zh or "").replace("|", "／")
   719→            lines.append(f"| {key} | {c.filename} | {c.section} | {item}｜{note} |")
   720→    lines.append("")
   721→
   722→    # ----- CHEAT_KEY -----
   723→    lines.append("## CHEAT_KEY（特色展示碼）")
   724→    lines.append("")
   725→    if not spec.cheat_keys:
   726→        lines.append("⚠ 未解析到 CHEAT_KEY 清單，或原 xlsx 未提供。")
   727→    else:
   728→        lines.append("| 效果 | 編號 | 備註 |")
   729→        lines.append("|---|---|---|")
   730→        for ck in spec.cheat_keys:
   731→            note = (ck.note or "").replace("\n", " ").replace("|", "／")
   732→            lines.append(f"| {ck.effect} | {ck.code} | {note} |")
   733→    lines.append("")
   734→
   735→    # ----- Performance flow (presence-only reporting, intentionally not parsed) -----
   736→    lines.append("## 演出流程（Performance_Flow）")
   737→    lines.append("")
   738→    lines.append("> **adapter 設計決定**：不自動推導 Performance_Flow 步驟清單。")
   739→    lines.append(">")
   740→    lines.append("> 原因：xlsx 內「三色幣主場狀態設定 / 前導動畫串接 / NearWin動畫 / FG_Declare宣告」")
   741→    lines.append("> 等 sheet 實測為**美術動畫細節或狀態組合 tag**，不是線性狀態機步驟；")
   742→    lines.append("> 硬解會產生誤導性的 Performance_Flow，不如不給。")
   743→    lines.append(">")
   744→    lines.append("> **預設行為**：codegen skill 應採用 `Standard_Flow`（`EFFECT_START → SCATTER_SHOW →")
   745→    lines.append("> AWARD → ROUND_SHOW_END → CHECK_STATE → ROUND_END`）；複合玩法的差異由 CHECK_STATE")
   746→    lines.append("> 內部分支與特色旗標（HAS_FREE_GAME / HAS_JACKPOT / ...）驅動，無須自訂 Performance_Flow。")
   747→    lines.append(">")
   748→    lines.append("> **何時應手動覆寫**：只有 Cascade / Tumble 這類「步驟本身與 Standard 不同」的玩法，")
   749→    lines.append("> 才需要在 Game_Spec 的 `【演出流程】` 章節自訂 step table（格式見 codegen skill 的")
   750→    lines.append("> `_performance-flow-examples.md`）。三幣瑞龍此類複合 FG 玩法**不需要**。")
   751→    lines.append("")
   752→
   753→    # Presence map — tell the designer what extra sheets exist in the xlsx
   754→    if spec.performance_hints:
   755→        lines.append("### 原 xlsx 中的流程相關 sheet（adapter 不解析，供設計者參考）")
   756→        lines.append("")
   757→        lines.append("| Sheet 名 | 類型 | 非空行數 | 說明 |")
   758→        lines.append("|---|---|---|---|")
   759→        for h in spec.performance_hints:
   760→            kind = h["kind"]
   761→            summary = h["summary"].replace("\n", " ")
   762→            lines.append(f"| `{h['sheet']}` | {kind} | {h['row_count']} | {summary} |")
   763→        lines.append("")
   764→        lines.append("> 類型說明：")
   765→        lines.append(">")
   766→        lines.append("> - `state-combo-tag`：列特殊狀態組合的命名（如 Scatter 三色幣 7 種組合）。可能對應 proto enum，但不是步驟順序。")
   767→        lines.append("> - `art-animation`：美術動畫的 Spine 節點名 / 時長 / 特效層。屬 `ART_ASSET_MANIFEST` 範疇。")
   768→        lines.append("> - `scene-structure`：Cocos Scene 節點樹；可用於 codegen 階段二的 Scene 建置輔助。")
   769→        lines.append("> - `art-manifest`：Prefab 清單；屬 `ART_ASSET_MANIFEST` 範疇。")
   770→        lines.append("")
   771→    else:
   772→        lines.append("> 原 xlsx 中未偵測到任何演出相關 sheet。採用 Standard_Flow。")
   773→        lines.append("")
   774→
   775→    # ----- Footer -----
   776→    lines.append("---")
   777→    lines.append("")
   778→    lines.append("### Adapter metadata")
   779→    lines.append("")
   780→    lines.append(f"- symbol count: {len(spec.symbols)}")
   781→    lines.append(f"- cheat-key count: {len(spec.cheat_keys)}")
   782→    lines.append(f"- audio-clip count: {len(spec.audio_clips)}")
   783→    lines.append(f"- warnings: {len(spec.warnings)}")
   784→    lines.append("")
   785→
   786→    return "\n".join(lines) + "\n"

   789→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   790→# Layout B parsers (Eye Strike / Gold Blitz style: numbered sheets like
   791→# "2.遊戲概述", "6.圖騰設計", "9.音樂音效(暫)")
   792→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   793→
   794→
   795→def _parse_board_size_variable(board_str: str) -> tuple[int | None, int | None, str]:
   796→    """Parse variable-height boards like '5x4x4x4x4x5' → (col=6, max_row=5, raw).
   797→    Also handles simple '3X5' → (col=5, row=3, raw).
   798→    Strips notes after '、', '(', '(' before parsing."""
   799→    if not board_str:
   800→        return None, None, ""
   801→    raw = board_str.strip()
   802→    # Strip trailing notes (e.g. "3x5、5x5 (其中...)" → "3x5")
   803→    clean = re.split(r"[、，,\(（]", raw)[0].strip()
   804→    # Try variable format first: 5x4x4x4x4x5 (all parts must be digits)
   805→    parts = re.split(r"[xX×]", clean)
   806→    if len(parts) > 2 and all(p.strip().isdigit() for p in parts):
   807→        col = len(parts)
   808→        max_row = max(int(p.strip()) for p in parts)
   809→        return col, max_row, raw
   810→    # Simple format
   811→    m = re.search(r"(\d+)\s*[xX×]\s*(\d+)", clean)
   812→    if m:
   813→        return int(m.group(2)), int(m.group(1)), raw  # COL, ROW
   814→    return None, None, raw
   815→
   816→
   817→def parse_layout_b_overview(ws: Worksheet, spec: ParsedSpec) -> None:
   818→    """Parse '2.遊戲概述' sheet for board size, pay mode, and ODDS table symbols."""
   819→    # Board size: find row with '盤面'
   820→    for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=30, max_col=10, values_only=True):
   821→        cells = [_s(c) for c in row]
   822→        if "盤面" in cells[1]:
   823→            board_val = cells[3] or cells[2]
   824→            col, max_row, raw = _parse_board_size_variable(board_val)
   825→            spec.col = col
   826→            spec.row = max_row
   827→            spec.board_layout = raw
   828→            if col is None:
   829→                spec.warnings.append(f"basic: 無法解析盤面大小 (原值 {board_val!r})")
   830→            break
   831→
   832→    # Pay mode: find row with '線數' or '對獎方式' or '對線'
   833→    for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=30, max_col=10, values_only=True):
   834→        cells = [_s(c) for c in row]
   835→        if "線數" in cells[1] or "對獎" in cells[1] or "對線" in cells[1]:
   836→            spec.pay_mode = _classify_pay_mode(cells[3] or cells[2])
   837→            break
   838→
   839→    # Game name from row with '基本規格說明'
   840→    for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=15, max_col=10, values_only=True):
   841→        cells = [_s(c) for c in row]
   842→        if "基本規格說明" in cells[1]:
   843→            spec.project.name_zh = ""  # will be filled from audio sheet
   844→            break
   845→
   846→    # Feature flags from key-value rows
   847→    for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=20, max_col=10, values_only=True):
   848→        cells = [_s(c) for c in row]
   849→        label = cells[1].lower() if len(cells) > 1 else ""
   850→        val = (cells[2] or "").lower() if len(cells) > 2 else ""
   851→        if "free game" in label and ("true" in val or "有" in val):
   852→            spec.has_free_game = True
   853→        if "jp" == label.strip() and ("true" in val or "有" in val):
   854→            spec.has_jackpot = True
   855→        if "buy bonus" in label and ("true" in val or "有" in val):
   856→            spec.has_buy_bonus = True
   857→
   858→
   859→def parse_layout_b_symbols(ws: Worksheet, spec: ParsedSpec) -> None:
   860→    """Parse symbol sheet. Supports multiple formats:
   861→    - Format 1 (Eye Strike): col C = numeric ID, col D = name
   862→    - Format 2 (Wrath of Thunder): col C = symbol name (M1/A/K), col D = size "1x1"
   863→    - Format 3 (FAR WEST): col B = symbol name, col D = numeric ID
   864→    - Format 4 (Leprechaun's Pots): col D = name, col F = symbol code (M1/H1), col G = area "1x1"
   865→    """
   866→    current_section = "一般"  # 一般符號 / 特殊符號
   867→    auto_idx = 0
   868→
   869→    # Detect Format 4: header row has '名稱' and '符號' and '面積'
   870→    is_format4 = False
   871→    format4_cols = {}  # name_col, sym_col, area_col
   872→    for r_idx, row in enumerate(ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=10, max_col=12, values_only=True), 1):
   873→        cells = [_s(c) for c in row]
   874→        if "名稱" in cells and "符號" in cells and "面積" in cells:
   875→            is_format4 = True
   876→            format4_cols = {
   877→                "name": cells.index("名稱"),
   878→                "sym": cells.index("符號"),
   879→                "area": cells.index("面積"),
   880→            }
   881→            # Also grab SymID col if present
   882→            if "SymID" in cells:
   883→                format4_cols["symid"] = cells.index("SymID")
   884→            break
   885→
   886→    if is_format4:
   887→        nc = format4_cols["name"]
   888→        sc = format4_cols["sym"]
   889→        sid_col = format4_cols.get("symid")
   890→        for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=120, max_col=12, values_only=True):
   891→            cells = [_s(c) for c in row] + [""] * 12
   892→            if "特殊符號" in cells[1] or "特殊" in cells[1]:
   893→                current_section = "特殊"
   894→                continue
   895→            if "一般符號" in cells[1] or "一般" in cells[1]:
   896→                current_section = "一般"
   897→                continue
   898→            sym_code = cells[sc]
   899→            display_name = cells[nc]
   900→            if not sym_code or not re.fullmatch(r"[A-Za-z]\w*", sym_code):
   901→                continue
   902→            if sym_code in ("符號", "名稱", "面積", "說明", "None"):
   903→                continue
   904→            if sid_col and cells[sid_col] and re.fullmatch(r"\d+", cells[sid_col]):
   905→                idx = int(cells[sid_col])
   906→            else:
   907→                idx = auto_idx
   908→            auto_idx += 1
   909→            disp_upper = sym_code.upper()
   910→            if "WILD" in disp_upper or "WW" in disp_upper:
   911→                category = "wild"
   912→            elif "SCATTER" in disp_upper or display_name and "scatter" in display_name.lower():
   913→                category = "scatter"
   914→            elif current_section == "特殊":
   915→                category = "special"
   916→            elif disp_upper in {"9", "10", "J", "Q", "K", "A"}:
   917→                category = "low"
   918→            else:
   919→                category = "high"
   920→            enum_name = _resolve_enum_name(f"Symbol_{idx:02d}", sym_code)
   921→            spec.symbols.append(SymbolRow(
   922→                index=idx, enum_name=enum_name, raw_enum_name=f"Symbol_{idx:02d}",
   923→                display=f"{sym_code} ({display_name})" if display_name else sym_code,
   924→                category=category, server_only=False,
   925→            ))
   926→        return
   927→
   928→    for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=120, max_col=10, values_only=True):
   929→        cells = [_s(c) for c in row]
   930→        # Section markers
   931→        if "特殊符號" in cells[1] or "特殊" in cells[1]:
   932→            current_section = "特殊"
   933→            continue
   934→        if "一般符號" in cells[1] or "一般" in cells[1]:
   935→            current_section = "一般"
   936→            continue
   937→
   938→        # Format 1: col C is numeric ID (but NOT if col D looks like area "1x1")
   939→        col_c = cells[2]
   940→        col_d = cells[3] if len(cells) > 3 else ""
   941→        col_b = cells[1]
   942→        is_area_format = bool(re.fullmatch(r"\d+x\d+", col_d))
   943→        if re.fullmatch(r"\d+", col_c) and not is_area_format:
   944→            idx = int(col_c)
   945→            display = col_d.split("\n")[0].strip() if col_d else ""
   946→        # Format 2: col C is symbol name, col D is area "1x1"
   947→        elif re.fullmatch(r"[A-Za-z]\w*", col_c) and col_c not in ("參考", "符號", "面積", "外框", "色調", "說明", "None", "True", "False") and is_area_format:
   948→            display = col_c
   949→            idx = auto_idx
   950→            auto_idx += 1
   951→        # Format 3: col B is symbol name, col D is numeric ID (FAR WEST style)
   952→        elif re.fullmatch(r"[A-Za-z]\w*", col_b) and col_b not in ("符號", "名稱", "參考", "一般符號", "特殊符號"):
   953→            display = col_b
   954→            if col_d and re.fullmatch(r"\d+", col_d):
   955→                idx = int(col_d)
   956→            else:
   957→                idx = auto_idx
   958→            auto_idx += 1
   959→        else:
   960→            continue
   961→
   962→        # Classify
   963→        disp_upper = display.upper()
   964→        if "WILD" in disp_upper:
   965→            category = "wild"
   966→        elif "SCATTER" in disp_upper:
   967→            category = "scatter"
   968→        elif current_section == "特殊":
   969→            category = "special"
   970→        elif disp_upper in {"9", "10", "J", "Q", "K", "A"}:
   971→            category = "low"
   972→        else:
   973→            category = "high"
   974→
   975→        enum_name = _resolve_enum_name(f"Symbol_{idx:02d}", display)
   976→        spec.symbols.append(SymbolRow(
   977→            index=idx,
   978→            enum_name=enum_name,
   979→            raw_enum_name=f"Symbol_{idx:02d}",
   980→            display=display,
   981→            category=category,
   982→            server_only=False,
   983→        ))
   984→
   985→
   986→
   987→def _parse_inline_symbols(ws: Worksheet, spec: ParsedSpec) -> None:
   988→    """Parse symbols from inline Odds Table in overview sheet (FAR WEST style).
   989→    Format: | 名稱 | 符號 | SymID | 2連線 | 3連線 | ... |"""
   990→    in_odds = False
   991→    current_section = "一般"
   992→    for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=80, max_col=10, values_only=True):
   993→        cells = [_s(c) for c in row]
   994→        # Detect Odds Table start
   995→        if "Odds" in cells[0]:
   996→            in_odds = True
   997→            continue
   998→        if not in_odds:
   999→            continue
  1000→        # Section markers
  1001→        if "特殊符號" in cells[1] or "特殊" in cells[1]:
  1002→            current_section = "特殊"
  1003→            continue
  1004→        if "一般符號" in cells[1]:
  1005→            current_section = "一般"
  1006→            continue
  1007→        # Symbol row: col B=名稱, col C=符號代碼, col D=SymID
  1008→        name = cells[1]
  1009→        sym_code = cells[2]
  1010→        sym_id = cells[3]
  1011→        if not name or not sym_code or name in ("名稱", "符號", "一般符號", "特殊符號"):
  1012→            continue
  1013→        idx = int(sym_id) if sym_id and re.fullmatch(r"\d+", sym_id) else len(spec.symbols)
  1014→        disp_upper = sym_code.upper()
  1015→        if "WILD" in disp_upper or "WW" in disp_upper:
  1016→            category = "wild"
  1017→        elif "SCATTER" in disp_upper or "BS" in disp_upper or "FS" in disp_upper:
  1018→            category = "scatter"
  1019→        elif current_section == "特殊":
  1020→            category = "special"
  1021→        elif disp_upper in {"9", "10", "J", "Q", "K", "A"}:
  1022→            category = "low"
  1023→        else:
  1024→            category = "high"
  1025→        enum_name = _resolve_enum_name(f"Symbol_{idx:02d}", sym_code)
  1026→        spec.symbols.append(SymbolRow(
  1027→            index=idx, enum_name=enum_name, raw_enum_name=f"Symbol_{idx:02d}",
  1028→            display=f"{sym_code} ({name})", category=category, server_only=False,
  1029→        ))
  1030→
  1031→
  1032→def parse_layout_b_audio(ws: Worksheet, spec: ParsedSpec) -> None:
  1033→    """Parse '9.音樂音效(暫)' sheet. Header row has '編號' in col A."""
  1034→    # Find game name
  1035→    for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=10, max_col=10, values_only=True):
  1036→        cells = [_s(c) for c in row]
  1037→        if "機種名稱" in cells[1]:
  1038→            spec.project.name_en = cells[3] or cells[2]
  1039→            if not spec.project.name_zh:
  1040→                spec.project.name_zh = spec.project.name_en
  1041→            break
  1042→
  1043→    # Find header row (col A = '編號' or '流水號')
  1044→    header_row = None
  1045→    filename_col = 3  # default: col D
  1046→    item_col = 1      # default: col B
  1047→    for r_idx, row in enumerate(ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=20, max_col=15, values_only=True), 1):
  1048→        cells = [_s(c) for c in row]
  1049→        if cells[0] in ("編號", "流水號"):
  1050→            header_row = r_idx
  1051→            # Find '檔名' column
  1052→            for ci, c in enumerate(cells):
  1053→                if "檔名" in c:
  1054→                    filename_col = ci
  1055→                    break
  1056→            # Find '品項' or '運用場景' column
  1057→            for ci, c in enumerate(cells):
  1058→                if c in ("品項", "運用場景"):
  1059→                    item_col = ci
  1060→                    break
  1061→            break
  1062→    if header_row is None:
  1063→        spec.warnings.append("audio: 找不到音效表 header（'編號' 欄）")
  1064→        return
  1065→
  1066→    current_section = ""
  1067→    for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=header_row + 1, max_row=200, max_col=15, values_only=True):
  1068→        cells = [_s(c) for c in row[:15]]
  1069→        col_a = cells[0]  # 編號/流水號
  1070→        col_item = cells[item_col] if item_col < len(cells) else ""
  1071→        col_fn = cells[filename_col] if filename_col < len(cells) else ""
  1072→
  1073→        # Section header: col A empty, col_item has section name
  1074→        if not col_a and col_item and not col_fn:
  1075→            current_section = col_item
  1076→            continue
  1077→
  1078→        # Data row: col A is numeric
  1079→        if not re.fullmatch(r"\d+", col_a):
  1080→            continue
  1081→        if not col_fn:
  1082→            continue
  1083→
  1084→        spec.audio_clips.append(AudioClip(
  1085→            section=current_section or "未分類",
  1086→            item_zh=col_item,
  1087→            filename=col_fn,
  1088→            note="",
  1089→        ))
  1090→
  1091→
  1092→def _detect_layout_b(wb) -> bool:
  1093→    """Detect numbered-sheet layout: Eye Strike / Gold Blitz / Wrath of Thunder / FAR WEST style.
  1094→    Has sheets starting with '2.' or '5.' or '6.' or '6-1.' (with or without space after dot)."""
  1095→    for name in wb.sheetnames:
  1096→        if re.match(r"^[256]\.\s*", name) or re.match(r"^6-1\.", name):
  1097→            return True
  1098→    return False
  1099→
  1100→
  1101→def _detect_layout_c(wb) -> bool:
  1102→    """Detect 海盜女王 style: has '基礎規則' but NOT '基本規格'."""
  1103→    return "基礎規則" in wb.sheetnames and "基本規格" not in wb.sheetnames
  1104→
  1105→
  1106→def parse_layout_c(ws: Worksheet, spec: ParsedSpec) -> None:
  1107→    """Parse 海盜女王 style '基礎規則' sheet.
  1108→    Symbol table starts at row with '一般'+'編號'+'SYMBOL樣式'.
  1109→    Board info embedded in text like '盤面5 X 6'."""
  1110→    # Find board size from text
  1111→    for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=50, max_col=15, values_only=True):
  1112→        for cell in row:
  1113→            txt = _s(cell)
  1114→            m = re.search(r"盤面\s*(\d+)\s*[xX×]\s*(\d+)", txt)
  1115→            if m:
  1116→                spec.row = int(m.group(1))  # 海盜女王: "盤面5 X 6" → ROW=5? 不對，是 COL=5 ROW=6
  1117→                spec.col = int(m.group(1))
  1118→                spec.row = int(m.group(2))
  1119→                spec.board_layout = "x".join([str(spec.row)] * spec.col)
  1120→                break
  1121→            # Also try "GAME ID" extraction
  1122→            m2 = re.search(r"GAME\s*ID\s*[=＝:：]\s*(\d+)", txt)
  1123→            if m2:
  1124→                spec.project.game_id = m2.group(1)
  1125→        if spec.col:
  1126→            break
  1127→
  1128→    # Pay mode from text
  1129→    for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=50, max_col=15, values_only=True):
  1130→        for cell in row:
  1131→            txt = _s(cell)
  1132→            if "多消" in txt or "CLUSTER" in txt.upper():
  1133→                spec.pay_mode = "CLUSTER_PAY"
  1134→                break
  1135→            if "WAY" in txt.upper():
  1136→                spec.pay_mode = "SCATTER_PAY"
  1137→                break
  1138→        if spec.pay_mode:
  1139→            break
  1140→
  1141→    # Game name from row 1
  1142→    for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=1, max_col=5, values_only=True):
  1143→        cells = [_s(c) for c in row]
  1144→        if cells[0]:
  1145→            # "海盜女王(難度：5星↑↑↑) " → "海盜女王"
  1146→            name = re.sub(r"\(.*\).*", "", cells[0]).strip()
  1147→            spec.project.name_zh = name
  1148→            break
  1149→
  1150→    # Symbol table: find header row with '編號' + 'SYMBOL樣式'
  1151→    header_row = None
  1152→    for r_idx, row in enumerate(ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=20, max_col=10, values_only=True), 1):
  1153→        cells = [_s(c) for c in row]
  1154→        if "編號" in cells and "SYMBOL樣式" in cells:
  1155→            header_row = r_idx
  1156→            break
  1157→    if not header_row:
  1158→        spec.warnings.append("symbols: 找不到 Symbol 表 header")
  1159→        return
  1160→
  1161→    current_side = "一般"
  1162→    for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=header_row + 1, max_row=header_row + 30, max_col=10, values_only=True):
  1163→        cells = [_s(c) for c in row]
  1164→        # Side tag in col A
  1165→        if cells[0] in ("一般", "特殊"):
  1166→            current_side = cells[0]
  1167→        # Data: col B = index, col C = display, col G = raw name
  1168→        col_b = cells[1]
  1169→        col_c = cells[2]
  1170→        col_g = cells[6] if len(cells) > 6 else ""
  1171→        if not re.fullmatch(r"\d+", col_b):
  1172→            continue
  1173→        idx = int(col_b)
  1174→        display = col_c
  1175→        raw_enum = col_g or f"Symbol_{idx:02d}"
  1176→
  1177→        if current_side == "特殊":
  1178→            disp_upper = display.upper()
  1179→            if "SCATTER" in disp_upper or "海盜旗" in display:
  1180→                category = "scatter"
  1181→            elif "WILD" in disp_upper:
  1182→                category = "wild"
  1183→            else:
  1184→                category = "special"
  1185→        elif display.upper() in {"9", "10", "J", "Q", "K", "A"}:
  1186→            category = "low"
  1187→        else:
  1188→            # Use 層級 col D if available
  1189→            level = cells[3] if len(cells) > 3 else ""
  1190→            if "低" in level:
  1191→                category = "low"
  1192→            elif "高" in level:
  1193→                category = "high"
  1194→            elif "中" in level:
  1195→                category = "high"
  1196→            else:
  1197→                category = "high"
  1198→
  1199→        enum_name = _resolve_enum_name(raw_enum, display)
  1200→        spec.symbols.append(SymbolRow(
  1201→            index=idx, enum_name=enum_name, raw_enum_name=raw_enum,
  1202→            display=display, category=category, server_only=False,
  1203→        ))
  1204→

  1207→# Entry point
  1208→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  1209→
  1210→
  1211→def run(xlsx_path: Path, out_path: Path) -> int:
  1212→    if not xlsx_path.exists():
  1213→        print(f"!! input file not found: {xlsx_path}", file=sys.stderr)
  1214→        return 3
  1215→    suffix = xlsx_path.suffix.lower()
  1216→    if suffix != ".xlsx":
  1217→        if suffix in (".docx", ".pdf"):
  1218→            # v2 stub: provide actionable guidance rather than a bare error.
  1219→            print(
  1220→                f"!! {suffix} input is not yet supported by spec_adapter v1.\n"
  1221→                f"   Options:\n"
  1222→                f"   1. Open the {suffix} in Excel / LibreOffice and Save As .xlsx, then re-run this adapter.\n"
  1223→                f"   2. Manually write a Game_Spec.md following the format in\n"
  1224→                f"      slot-game-codegen-skill/_game-spec-example.md\n"
  1225→                f"   3. Wait for adapter v2 which will add {suffix} parsing "
  1226→                f"(python-docx / pypdf — both deps are installed but the parser is not written).",
  1227→                file=sys.stderr,
  1228→            )
  1229→            return 3
  1230→        print(f"!! input must be .xlsx (got {xlsx_path.suffix!r})", file=sys.stderr)
  1231→        return 3
  1232→
  1233→    wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(xlsx_path, data_only=True, read_only=False)
  1234→    spec = ParsedSpec()
  1235→
  1236→    if _detect_layout_b(wb):
  1237→        # Layout B: numbered-sheet style (Eye Strike / Gold Blitz / Wrath of Thunder)
  1238→        # Overview sheet: try multiple names
  1239→        overview_sheet = None
  1240→        for name in wb.sheetnames:
  1241→            if re.match(r"^2\.\s*", name):
  1242→                overview_sheet = name
  1243→                break
  1244→        if overview_sheet:
  1245→            parse_layout_b_overview(wb[overview_sheet], spec)
  1246→        else:
  1247→            spec.warnings.append("缺少『2.遊戲概述』或『2.基本規格』sheet")
  1248→
  1249→        # Symbol sheet: try multiple names
  1250→        symbol_sheet = None
  1251→        for name in wb.sheetnames:
  1252→            if re.match(r"^[56]", name) and ("圖騰" in name or "符號" in name or "Symbol" in name.lower()):
  1253→                symbol_sheet = name
  1254→                break
  1255→        if symbol_sheet:
  1256→            parse_layout_b_symbols(wb[symbol_sheet], spec)
  1257→        else:
  1258→            # FAR WEST style: symbols are in the same overview sheet (Odds Table section)
  1259→            if overview_sheet:
  1260→                _parse_inline_symbols(wb[overview_sheet], spec)
  1261→            if not spec.symbols:
  1262→                spec.warnings.append("缺少圖騰設計 sheet")
  1263→
  1264→        # Audio: try multiple possible names
  1265→        audio_sheet = None
  1266→        for name in wb.sheetnames:
  1267→            if "音樂音效" in name or "音效" in name:
  1268→                audio_sheet = name
  1269→                break
  1270→        if audio_sheet:
  1271→            parse_layout_b_audio(wb[audio_sheet], spec)
  1272→        else:
  1273→            spec.warnings.append("缺少音樂音效 sheet")
  1274→
  1275→        # Feature flags from sheet names
  1276→        for name in wb.sheetnames:
  1277→            if "FreeGame" in name or "Free" in name.replace(" ", "") or "_FG" in name:
  1278→                spec.has_free_game = True
  1279→            if "Buy" in name and "Bonus" in name:
  1280→                spec.has_buy_bonus = True
  1281→            if "Gold" in name or "Blitz" in name:
  1282→                spec.has_jackpot = True
  1283→            if "BUY BONUS" in name.upper():
  1284→                spec.has_buy_bonus = True
  1285→
  1286→    elif _detect_layout_c(wb):
  1287→        # Layout C: 海盜女王 style (基礎規則 with inline symbol table)
  1288→        parse_layout_c(wb["基礎規則"], spec)
  1289→
  1290→        # Audio
  1291→        audio_sheet = None
  1292→        for name in wb.sheetnames:
  1293→            if "音樂音效" in name:
  1294→                audio_sheet = name
  1295→                break
  1296→        if audio_sheet:
  1297→            parse_layout_b_audio(wb[audio_sheet], spec)
  1298→        else:
  1299→            spec.warnings.append("缺少音樂音效 sheet")
  1300→
  1301→    else:
  1302→        # Layout A: 三幣瑞龍 / 海盜女王 style (13-sheet)
  1303→        if "專案資訊" in wb.sheetnames:
  1304→            parse_project_info(wb["專案資訊"], spec)
  1305→        else:
  1306→            spec.warnings.append("缺少『專案資訊』sheet")
  1307→
  1308→        if "基本規格" in wb.sheetnames:
  1309→            ws = wb["基本規格"]
  1310→            parse_basic_header(ws, spec)
  1311→            parse_symbol_table(ws, spec)
  1312→            parse_cheat_keys(ws, spec)
  1313→        elif "基礎規則" in wb.sheetnames:
  1314→            ws = wb["基礎規則"]
  1315→            parse_basic_header(ws, spec)
  1316→            parse_symbol_table(ws, spec)
  1317→            parse_cheat_keys(ws, spec)
  1318→        else:
  1319→            spec.warnings.append("缺少『基本規格』sheet — 無法產出核心欄位，請檢查 xlsx 結構")
  1320→
  1321→        if "音樂音效規格表" in wb.sheetnames:
  1322→            parse_audio(wb["音樂音效規格表"], spec)
  1323→        elif "音樂音效規格" in wb.sheetnames:
  1324→            parse_audio(wb["音樂音效規格"], spec)
  1325→        else:
  1326→            spec.warnings.append("缺少『音樂音效規格表』sheet")
  1327→
  1328→    # Performance-flow hint scan (does NOT parse; only records presence + size)
  1329→    scan_performance_hints(wb, spec)
  1330→
  1331→    # Fallback: derive game name from filename if not parsed
  1332→    if not spec.project.name_zh and not spec.project.name_en:
  1333→        stem = xlsx_path.stem  # e.g. "3 Leprechaun's Pots_規格書"
  1334→        # Remove common suffixes
  1335→        name = re.sub(r"[_\s]*(規格書|規格|spec|Spec).*$", "", stem).strip()
  1336→        # Remove leading number prefix
  1337→        name = re.sub(r"^\d+\s*", "", name).strip()
  1338→        if name:
  1339→            spec.project.name_en = name
  1340→
  1341→    derive_feature_flags(spec)
  1342→
  1343→    md = emit_markdown(spec)
  1344→    out_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
  1345→    out_path.write_text(md, encoding="utf-8")
  1346→
  1347→    print(f"OK: wrote {out_path}  ({len(md):,} chars, {len(spec.warnings)} warnings)")
  1348→    for w in spec.warnings:
  1349→        print(f"  ⚠ {w}")
  1350→    return 0
  1351→
  1352→
  1353→def main() -> int:
  1354→    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="UK slot xlsx → Game_Spec.md adapter")
  1355→    ap.add_argument("input", type=Path, help="path to the slot spec xlsx")
  1356→    ap.add_argument("output", type=Path, help="destination Game_Spec.md path")
  1357→    args = ap.parse_args()
  1358→    return run(args.input, args.output)
  1359→
  1360→
  1361→if __name__ == "__main__":
  1362→    sys.exit(main())
  1363→

```
     1→"""
     2→uk-slot-spec-adapter / spec_adapter.py
     3→======================================
     4→
     5→Convert a UK slot specification xlsx (the kind produced by the design team, e.g.
     6→"三幣瑞龍專案規格文件.xlsx") into a Markdown-formatted `Game_Spec.md` suitable
     7→as the stage-1 input for the `slot-game-codegen-skill` Kiro skill.
     8→
     9→Scope: xlsx only in v1. docx/pdf will be added later.
    10→
    11→Design principles:
    12→  * Label-based lookup (find "遊戲名稱(中文)" → take the cell to the right of it),
    13→    not hard-coded row numbers. This makes the adapter robust to minor xlsx edits.
    14→  * Section-based parsing inside the `基本規格` sheet. Each section is delimited
    15→    by a "■xxx" marker row. We walk rows after the marker until we hit the next
    16→    marker or a long run of empty rows.
    17→  * Never fail silently: any field we cannot extract is emitted as a ⚠ warning in
    18→    the output Markdown (and also in the `Parse Warnings` section at the top).
    19→
    20→CLI:
    21→    py spec_adapter.py <input.xlsx> <output.md>
    22→
    23→Returns:
    24→    exit code 0 on success (even if there are warnings),
    25→    exit code 2 on usage error,
    26→    exit code 3 on unrecoverable failure (file missing / not xlsx / no basic
    27→    sheet, etc.).
    28→"""
    29→from __future__ import annotations
    30→
    31→import argparse
    32→import re
    33→import sys
    34→from dataclasses import dataclass, field
    35→from pathlib import Path
    36→from typing import Iterable
    37→
    38→import openpyxl
    39→from openpyxl.worksheet.worksheet import Worksheet
    40→
    41→
    42→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    43→# Data classes (Game_Spec intermediate representation)
    44→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    45→
    46→
    47→@dataclass
    48→class ProjectInfo:
    49→    name_zh: str = ""
    50→    name_en: str = ""
    51→    game_id: str = ""
    52→    short_name: str = ""
    53→
    54→
    55→@dataclass
    56→class SymbolRow:
    57→    index: int
    58→    enum_name: str          # canonical enum member name (alias if in whitelist, else Symbol_NN)
    59→    raw_enum_name: str      # original '系統命名' column value, always e.g. "Symbol_00"
    60→    display: str            # original 樣式 column, e.g. "9", "10", "J", "盆栽"
    61→    category: str           # "low"/"high"/"wild"/"scatter"/"special"  (server-only → "special" + server_only=True)
    62→    server_only: bool = False  # True when 基本規格 sheet col B = "Server用"
    63→
    64→
    65→@dataclass
    66→class CheatKeyRow:
    67→    effect: str   # e.g. "必進FG(猛虎)"
    68→    code: str     # e.g. "1012"
    69→    note: str
    70→
    71→
    72→@dataclass
    73→class AudioClip:
    74→    section: str        # BGM / MG通用 / FG相關 / 補充
    75→    item_zh: str        # "停輪音效"
    76→    filename: str       # "reel_stop"
    77→    note: str
    78→
    79→
    80→@dataclass
    81→class ParsedSpec:
    82→    project: ProjectInfo = field(default_factory=ProjectInfo)
    83→    pay_mode: str = ""         # LINE_PAY / SCATTER_PAY / UNKNOWN
    84→    col: int | None = None
    85→    row: int | None = None
    86→    board_layout: str = ""     # e.g. "5x4x4x4x4x5" (per-column row counts) or "" if uniform
    87→    symbol_notes: str = ""     # e.g. "6小、5大、3SCATTER、1WILD"
    88→    symbols: list[SymbolRow] = field(default_factory=list)
    89→    cheat_keys: list[CheatKeyRow] = field(default_factory=list)
    90→    audio_clips: list[AudioClip] = field(default_factory=list)
    91→    has_free_game: bool = False
    92→    has_jackpot: bool = False
    93→    has_buy_bonus: bool = False
    94→    custom_features: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)  # non-standard features detected from spec
    95→    performance_hints: list[dict] = field(default_factory=list)  # [{'sheet': str, 'kind': str, 'summary': str, 'row_count': int}]
    96→    warnings: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    97→
    98→
    99→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   100→# Utility helpers
   101→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   102→
   103→
   104→def _s(v) -> str:
   105→    """Cell value → trimmed string; None → ''."""
   106→    if v is None:
   107→        return ""
   108→    return str(v).strip()
   109→
   110→
   111→def _nonblank(row: tuple) -> bool:
   112→    return any(_s(c) != "" for c in row)
   113→
   114→
   115→def _find_label_row(ws: Worksheet, label_needle: str, max_row: int = 100, search_cols: int = 10) -> int | None:
   116→    """Find the first row whose any cell (within `search_cols`) strip-equals the needle."""
   117→    for r_idx, row in enumerate(
   118→        ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=max_row, max_col=search_cols, values_only=True),
   119→        start=1,
   120→    ):
   121→        for cell in row:
   122→            if _s(cell) == label_needle:
   123→                return r_idx
   124→    return None
   125→
   126→
   127→def _cell_right_of_label(ws: Worksheet, label: str, max_row: int = 100, search_cols: int = 10) -> str:
   128→    """Find the label in any cell, return the non-empty cell to its immediate right.
   129→
   130→    Tolerates multiple label hits (takes first). Returns '' if not found.
   131→    """
   132→    for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=max_row, max_col=search_cols, values_only=True):
   133→        for c_idx, cell in enumerate(row[:-1]):
   134→            if _s(cell) == label:
   135→                # scan right until we find non-empty
   136→                for follow in row[c_idx + 1:]:
   137→                    if _s(follow) != "":
   138→                        return _s(follow)
   139→                return ""
   140→    return ""
   141→
   142→
   143→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   144→# Sheet parsers
   145→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   146→
   147→
   148→def parse_project_info(ws: Worksheet, spec: ParsedSpec) -> None:
   149→    spec.project.name_zh = _cell_right_of_label(ws, "遊戲名稱(中文)")
   150→    spec.project.name_en = _cell_right_of_label(ws, "遊戲名稱(英文)")
   151→    spec.project.game_id = _cell_right_of_label(ws, "GAME ID")
   152→    spec.project.short_name = _cell_right_of_label(ws, "縮寫")
   153→
   154→    for field_name, attr in (
   155→        ("遊戲名稱(中文)", "name_zh"),
   156→        ("GAME ID", "game_id"),
   157→        ("縮寫", "short_name"),
   158→    ):
   159→        if not getattr(spec.project, attr):
   160→            spec.warnings.append(f"project_info: 找不到欄位 {field_name!r}")
   161→
   162→
   163→def _parse_board_size(board_str: str) -> tuple[int | None, int | None]:
   164→    """Parse '3X5' → (ROW=3, COL=5).  Also accepts '3x5', '3×5', ' 3 X 5 '."""
   165→    if not board_str:
   166→        return None, None
   167→    m = re.search(r"(\d+)\s*[xX×]\s*(\d+)", board_str)
   168→    if not m:
   169→        return None, None
   170→    return int(m.group(1)), int(m.group(2))
   171→
   172→
   173→def _classify_pay_mode(lines_str: str) -> str:
   174→    """'243 WAYS' / '1024 WAYS' → SCATTER_PAY; '10 LINES' → LINE_PAY."""
   175→    if not lines_str:
   176→        return "UNKNOWN"
   177→    s = lines_str.upper()
   178→    if "WAY" in s:
   179→        return "SCATTER_PAY"
   180→    if "LINE" in s or "線" in lines_str:
   181→        return "LINE_PAY"
   182→    if "CLUSTER" in s:
   183→        return "CLUSTER_PAY"
   184→    return "UNKNOWN"
   185→
   186→
   187→def parse_basic_header(ws: Worksheet, spec: ParsedSpec) -> None:
   188→    board = _cell_right_of_label(ws, "盤面大小", max_row=50)
   189→    lines = _cell_right_of_label(ws, "中獎線數", max_row=50)
   190→    sym_notes = _cell_right_of_label(ws, "符號種類", max_row=50)
   191→
   192→    spec.row, spec.col = _parse_board_size(board)
   193→    spec.pay_mode = _classify_pay_mode(lines)
   194→    spec.symbol_notes = sym_notes
   195→    # Uniform board: generate layout string like "3x3x3x3x3"
   196→    if spec.row and spec.col:
   197→        spec.board_layout = "x".join([str(spec.row)] * spec.col)
   198→
   199→    if spec.row is None or spec.col is None:
   200→        spec.warnings.append(
   201→            f"basic: 無法解析盤面大小 (原值 {board!r})。請確認『基本規格』sheet 的『盤面大小』值格式為 'ROW×COL' (如 3X5)"
   202→        )
   203→    if spec.pay_mode == "UNKNOWN":
   204→        spec.warnings.append(
   205→            f"basic: 無法辨識中獎線數 {lines!r} 的賠付模式，fallback=UNKNOWN"
   206→        )
   207→
   208→
   209→_CATEGORY_FROM_DISPLAY = [
   210→    # lower-priority displays first so specific matches win
   211→    ("SCATTER", "scatter"),
   212→    ("WILD", "wild"),
   213→    ("神秘", "special"),
   214→    ("金幣", "special"),
   215→]
   216→
   217→
   218→# Whitelist of safe display → enum-name aliases.
   219→# Rules:
   220→#   - Only map displays we are CERTAIN about; preserve Symbol_NN for everything
   221→#     else (e.g. 盆栽, 扇子, 猛虎, 神龍 are game-specific Chinese names that we
   222→#     refuse to auto-translate — wrong English could break downstream).
   223→#   - SCATTER(X) → ScatterX via _scatter_variant_alias() so we don't have to
   224→#     enumerate every variant.
   225→#   - Keys are uppercase-compared so "wild" / "Wild" / "WILD" all match.
   226→_SYMBOL_ALIAS_MAP: dict[str, str] = {
   227→    "9": "Nine",
   228→    "10": "Ten",
   229→    "J": "J",
   230→    "Q": "Q",
   231→    "K": "K",
   232→    "A": "A",
   233→    "WILD": "Wild",
   234→    "SCATTER": "Scatter",
   235→}
   236→
   237→
   238→def _scatter_variant_alias(display: str) -> str | None:
   239→    """Map 'SCATTER(猛虎)' → 'ScatterTiger' only for a small whitelist of
   240→    well-known Mandarin game symbols we've seen in UK slots. Return None if
   241→    we can't be confident."""
   242→    # only handle forms like SCATTER(...)
   243→    m = re.match(r"SCATTER\(([^)]+)\)", display.strip(), flags=re.IGNORECASE)
   244→    if not m:
   245→        return None
   246→    inner = m.group(1).strip()
   247→    # whitelist — add more as we encounter new UK slot Chinese variants
   248→    inner_map: dict[str, str] = {
   249→        "猛虎": "Tiger",
   250→        "神龍": "Dragon",
   251→        "鯉魚": "Koi",
   252→        "虎": "Tiger",
   253→        "龍": "Dragon",
   254→        "魚": "Koi",
   255→    }
   256→    if inner in inner_map:
   257→        return f"Scatter{inner_map[inner]}"
   258→    # if inner is already ASCII (e.g. SCATTER(GOLD)) → ScatterGold
   259→    if re.fullmatch(r"[A-Za-z0-9_]+", inner):
   260→        return f"Scatter{inner.capitalize()}"
   261→    return None
   262→
   263→
   264→def _resolve_enum_name(raw: str, display: str) -> str:
   265→    """Decide the TypeScript enum name.
   266→
   267→    Preference order:
   268→      1. Scatter variant match (e.g. SCATTER(猛虎) → ScatterTiger)
   269→      2. Direct whitelist hit on display (e.g. '9' → 'Nine', 'WILD' → 'Wild')
   270→      3. Fall back to raw 系統命名 column value (e.g. 'Symbol_06') — this is
   271→         always a valid TypeScript identifier and preserves the original
   272→         ordering.
   273→
   274→    We deliberately DO NOT translate game-specific Chinese symbols (盆栽,
   275→    扇子, 猛虎 etc.) to avoid brittle/ambiguous English names.
   276→    """
   277→    d = (display or "").strip()
   278→    if not d:
   279→        return raw or "UnnamedSymbol"
   280→    # 1. scatter variant
   281→    scatter_alias = _scatter_variant_alias(d)
   282→    if scatter_alias:
   283→        return scatter_alias
   284→    # 2. direct whitelist
   285→    alias = _SYMBOL_ALIAS_MAP.get(d.upper())
   286→    if alias:
   287→        return alias
   288→    # 3. fallback
   289→    return raw or f"Symbol_Unknown_{d}"
   290→
   291→
   292→def _is_server_only(side_col_b: str) -> bool:
   293→    """Detect whether this symbol row falls under the 'Server用' sticky side tag."""
   294→    side = side_col_b or ""
   295→    side_normalized = re.sub(r"\s+", "", side)
   296→    return (
   297→        "SERVER" in side_normalized.upper()
   298→        or "伺服器" in side_normalized
   299→        or side_normalized == "Server用"
   300→    )
   301→
   302→
   303→def _classify_symbol(display: str, side_col_b: str, idx: int, total_low_hint: int | None) -> str:
   304→    """Best-effort classification.
   305→
   306→    Rules:
   307→      1. server-only rows → classified to 'special' by category, and `server_only=True`
   308→         is recorded separately on SymbolRow by the caller. This keeps the set of
   309→         categories aligned with `_input-format.md` (low/high/wild/scatter/special)
   310→         while preserving the 'server-only' semantic elsewhere. (See E2E-1 fix)
   311→      2. col B tag '特殊' + display contains SCATTER/WILD → that
   312→      3. col B tag '特殊' + otherwise → special
   313→      4. col B tag '一般' → low/high by display heuristic
   314→         - display in {9,10,J,Q,K,A} → low
   315→         - everything else → high
   316→    """
   317→    side = side_col_b or ""
   318→    side_normalized = re.sub(r"\s+", "", side)
   319→    disp_upper = display.upper()
   320→    # (1) Server-only rows collapse to 'special' for the skill's 5-category schema.
   321→    if _is_server_only(side):
   322→        return "special"
   323→    if "特殊" in side_normalized:
   324→        for keyword, cat in _CATEGORY_FROM_DISPLAY:
   325→            if keyword in disp_upper:
   326→                return cat
   327→        return "special"
   328→    # 一般 / default
   329→    if disp_upper in {"9", "10", "J", "Q", "K", "A"} or display in {"9", "10"}:
   330→        return "low"
   331→    return "high"
   332→
   333→
   334→def parse_symbol_table(ws: Worksheet, spec: ParsedSpec) -> None:
   335→    """Walk rows to find '■Symbol賠付表' header, then parse rows until next '■'."""
   336→    start_row = _find_label_row(ws, "■Symbol賠付表  (Win=Total Bet*Pay)", max_row=300)
   337→    if start_row is None:
   338→        # try looser match
   339→        for r_idx, row in enumerate(
   340→            ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=300, max_col=10, values_only=True),
   341→            start=1,
   342→        ):
   343→            for cell in row:
   344→                txt = _s(cell)
   345→                if txt.startswith("■Symbol") or txt.startswith("■符號"):
   346→                    start_row = r_idx
   347→                    break
   348→            if start_row:
   349→                break
   350→    if start_row is None:
   351→        spec.warnings.append("symbols: 找不到『■Symbol賠付表』區塊，無法解析符號清單")
   352→        return
   353→
   354→    # data rows start 2 rows after the "編號 | 系統命名 | SYMBOL樣式 | ..." header
   355→    current_side = ""  # 一般 / 特殊 / Server用 (sticky between rows)
   356→    for r_idx, row in enumerate(
   357→        ws.iter_rows(min_row=start_row + 1, max_row=start_row + 80, max_col=10, values_only=True),
   358→        start=start_row + 1,
   359→    ):
   360→        cells = [_s(c) for c in row]
   361→        # abort if we hit the next "■" section
   362→        if any(c.startswith("■") for c in cells):
   363→            break
   364→
   365→        col_b, col_c, col_d, col_e = cells[1], cells[2], cells[3], cells[4]
   366→        # normalize the side tag: Excel cells sometimes contain an embedded newline
   367→        # like "Server\n用" due to in-cell wrapping; collapse all whitespace so the
   368→        # sticky state machine picks it up correctly.
   369→        col_b_normalized = re.sub(r"\s+", "", col_b)
   370→        if col_b_normalized in ("一般", "特殊", "Server用"):
   371→            current_side = col_b_normalized
   372→        # expect col_c to be numeric symbol index
   373→        if not re.fullmatch(r"\d+", col_c):
   374→            continue
   375→        idx = int(col_c)
   376→        raw_enum = col_d  # Symbol_00 / Symbol_11 etc
   377→        display = col_e
   378→        if not raw_enum:
   379→            continue
   380→        category = _classify_symbol(display, current_side, idx, None)
   381→        server_only = _is_server_only(current_side)
   382→        # Alias lookup: try to promote well-known symbols ('9'→Nine, 'WILD'→Wild,
   383→        # 'SCATTER(猛虎)'→ScatterTiger) while keeping non-whitelisted Chinese
   384→        # names (盆栽/扇子/猛虎/神龍) as Symbol_NN for safety.
   385→        enum_name = _resolve_enum_name(raw_enum, display)
   386→        spec.symbols.append(
   387→            SymbolRow(
   388→                index=idx,
   389→                enum_name=enum_name,
   390→                raw_enum_name=raw_enum,
   391→                display=display,
   392→                category=category,
   393→                server_only=server_only,
   394→            )
   395→        )
   396→
   397→    if not spec.symbols:
   398→        spec.warnings.append("symbols: 已找到賠付表 header，但解析不到任何 symbol 資料列")
   399→
   400→
   401→def parse_cheat_keys(ws: Worksheet, spec: ParsedSpec) -> None:
   402→    start_row = None
   403→    for r_idx, row in enumerate(
   404→        ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=300, max_col=10, values_only=True),
   405→        start=1,
   406→    ):
   407→        for cell in row:
   408→            txt = _s(cell)
   409→            if txt.startswith("■特色展示碼"):
   410→                start_row = r_idx
   411→                break
   412→        if start_row:
   413→            break
   414→    if start_row is None:
   415→        spec.warnings.append("cheat_keys: 找不到『■特色展示碼』區塊，Demo_Module CHEAT_KEY 將使用預設值")
   416→        return
   417→
   418→    # skip the header row ("效果 | 編號 | 備註")
   419→    for r_idx, row in enumerate(
   420→        ws.iter_rows(min_row=start_row + 1, max_row=start_row + 80, max_col=10, values_only=True),
   421→        start=start_row + 1,
   422→    ):
   423→        cells = [_s(c) for c in row]
   424→        if any(c.startswith("■") for c in cells):
   425→            break
   426→        effect = cells[1]
   427→        code = cells[2]
   428→        note = cells[3] if len(cells) > 3 else ""
   429→        # header row has effect="效果"
   430→        if effect in ("", "效果"):
   431→            continue
   432→        if not re.fullmatch(r"-?\d+", code):
   433→            continue
   434→        spec.cheat_keys.append(CheatKeyRow(effect=effect, code=code, note=note))
   435→
   436→
   437→def parse_audio(ws: Worksheet, spec: ParsedSpec) -> None:
   438→    """Walk 音樂音效規格表. Each section header row has col B = section name
   439→    and col C = 'LOOP'. Data rows have col A = index number."""
   440→    current_section = ""
   441→    for r_idx, row in enumerate(
   442→        ws.iter_rows(min_row=1, max_row=200, max_col=10, values_only=True),
   443→        start=1,
   444→    ):
   445→        cells = [_s(c) for c in row]
   446→        col_a, col_b, col_c, col_g = cells[0], cells[1], cells[2] if len(cells) > 2 else "", cells[6] if len(cells) > 6 else ""
   447→        note_col = cells[5] if len(cells) > 5 else ""
   448→
   449→        # Section header detection: col B looks like a name, col C == 'LOOP'
   450→        if col_c == "LOOP" and col_b and col_a == "":
   451→            current_section = col_b
   452→            continue
   453→
   454→        # skip pure header rows
   455→        if not col_g:
   456→            continue
   457→        if col_b in ("項目", "", "LOOP"):
   458→            continue
   459→        # 檔名 col_g: allow multi-line (the xlsx sometimes stuffs 3 names separated by \n)
   460→        filenames = [fn.strip() for fn in col_g.replace("\r", "").split("\n") if fn.strip()]
   461→        for fn in filenames:
   462→            spec.audio_clips.append(
   463→                AudioClip(section=current_section or "未分類", item_zh=col_b, filename=fn, note=note_col)
   464→            )
   465→
